top_signals.title: Cboe Seeks to List Prediction Market Type Options on Earnings Metrics
top_signals.summary: Cboe Global Markets Inc. is seeking US regulatory approval to list all-or-nothing options tied to corporate earnings results, allowing traders to wager on figures ranging from SpaceX revenue and Nvidia data-center sales to JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s credit-loss provisions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Lenders to Clearlake-Backed Tungsten Sign Pact After Debt Slides
top_signals.summary: Lenders to Tungsten Automation have signed a pact agreeing to work together on a potential debt restructuring following a steep slide in the software company’s debt prices, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Aflac Japan reports breach on 4.38m customers, includes bank details
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
